positive.prompt: Refresh the standard parts of this repo after the template change
Bring the managed CLAUDE.md block up to the latest factory version
The marketplace shipped new workflow templates, update this repo to match

negative.prompt: Stamp this fresh repository with the standard setup
Check the whole fleet for repos that need updating

evals.prompt: This repo was stamped a while ago; update it to the current factory standard.
evals.expected_output: Only the standard parts refreshed (workflows, settings wiring, marker-fenced block); project-specific content untouched
expectations: Only content between the factory:standard markers in CLAUDE.md is replaced
Project-specific sections of CLAUDE.md are byte-identical before and after
Workflow files are re-copied from the plugin templates
